trace.rationale: Historical by-election patterns show incumbents often retain seats, but resignation and timing may reduce advantage. Analogous cases suggest a 60-70% chance for the candidate from the incumbent party.
Insufficient information to determine outcome; by-election dynamics and candidate specifics unknown.
